LanguageData.MN_SettingsEnableLoggingDescription: When enabled, Matter Network will write message and warning logs. Errors and exceptions are always logged.
LanguageData.MN_SettingsDisableNetworkItemsForWealthD: When enabled, items stored inside Matter Network do not add to colony wealth. When disabled, network items are still counted once each instead of once per interface/controller path.
LanguageData.MN_DiskDriveLockDesc: When locked, disks in this drive will not be hauled out because of storage priority.
LanguageData.MN_DiskDriveInspectArchived: Offline archived data: {0} bytes across {1} disks
LanguageData.MN_ControllerInspectOvercommitted: Overcommitted: {0} bytes - add more disks or remove items
LanguageData.MN_ControllerInspectConflictDisabled: Controller conflict: disabled (another controller in same network has lower ID)
